definition.fallbackUse: Use text wordmark and badge stack across web, Drive, workbook, dashboard, and package surfaces until a reviewed logo asset is confirmed.
definition.approvedAssetRequirement: A logo may be embedded only after the asset source, ownership/use right, intended surface, and public/private visibility are confirmed.
blocked: public use of private/internal symbol before owner review
logo variant without source path or asset ID

currentQuestions.question: Should Achilles use the text wordmark ACHILLES as the default logo across all dashboards until a reviewed image asset is confirmed?
Should the Cognigrex steady stream line appear directly under the Achilles wordmark on primary landing/dashboard surfaces?
Should logo/image assets remain private/internal until a specific public-facing asset is owner-approved?
What visual motif should guide the eventual reviewed Achilles logo: shield, spear, node-globe, geometric lens, classical/Greek, industrial systems, or another direction?
